calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of The First Cause Of Action Of The Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SPECIALIST STAFFING SOLUTIONS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of The First Cause Of Action Of The Complaint.

Plaintiff Specialist Staff Solutions, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication of the first cause of action of the complaint is denied. There is a triable dispute whether the parties' contract required plaintiff to submit a suitable candidate.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiff Cross Defendant Specialist Staffing Solutions, Incs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Of The Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF/CORSS-DEFENDANT SPECIALIST STAFFING SOLUTIONS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of The Cross Complaint.

Cross-defendant Specialist Staff Solutions, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment of the cross-complaint is denied. There is a triable dispute whether the parties' contract required plaintiff to submit a suitable candidate.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
